issue.title: [test] Add support for GitLab CI as an alternative to GitHub Actions
issue.body:
## Feature request

It would be great if OpenCI could integrate with GitLab CI/CD pipelines, not just GitHub Actions. Many teams use GitLab and would benefit from the AI-powered workflow capabilities.

## Proposed solution
Add a GitLab CI template (`.gitlab-ci.yml`) that calls the same underlying Claude harness via a Docker runner.

## Alternatives considered
- Using GitHub Actions as a proxy (too complex)
- Self-hosted runners with GitHub bridge (adds infrastructure overhead)

## Additional context
Our team migrates from GitLab to GitHub gradually, and interoperability would help bridge the transition.
